summary: Phase 3 Trade Credit Back System testing completed. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Frontend UI displays credit balance, history, and upgrade prompts properly for trade/non-trade customers.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend GET /api/shop/trade/credits correctly returns is_trade, credit_balance, credit_rate, credit_history, total_earned, total_redeemed
Backend GET /api/shop/trade/credits/summary correctly returns dashboard summary with recent_transactions
Backend POST /api/shop/trade/credits/earn correctly validates order ownership, payment status, and prevents duplicate awards
Backend POST /api/shop/trade/credits/redeem correctly validates credit balance, redemption amount, and order status
Backend award_credits_for_order() function is called from payment confirmation flow (line 814 in shop.py)
Frontend TileAccountPage.js correctly displays Trade Credit Balance card with Available Balance, Total Earned, Total Redeemed for trade customers
Frontend TileAccountPage.js correctly displays 'Upgrade to Trade Account' prompt for non-trade customers
Frontend TileCheckoutPage.js has credit redemption UI with input field (data-testid='credits-input') and 'Use All' button
Credit rate is correctly displayed as 2% badge on trade account page
seed_data_creation: Used existing trade customer (trade@test.com) with £25.50 credit balance. Created new non-trade customer (nontrade_test@example.com) for comparison testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Credit Back System complete. Trade customer trade@test.com has £25.50 credits, 2 credit history records showing +£15.50 and +£10.00 from orders. Checkout credit UI cannot be fully tested via Playwright because cart uses localStorage. API endpoints for earn/redeem work correctly - earn validates order ownership and payment status, redeem validates balance and prevents negative redemptions.

tests_executed.notes: Returns is_trade=true, credit_balance=25.50, credit_history with 2 records
Returns summary with credit_balance, total_earned, recent_transactions
Returns is_trade=false with 'Upgrade to trade account' message
Returns credit_balance and credit_rate for trade customers
Records contain id, type, amount, description, created_at

tests_executed.test: Trade customer UI - Credit Balance section
tests_executed.notes: Shows Trade Credit Balance header, Available Balance £25.50, Total Earned £25.50, Total Redeemed £0.00, Recent Transactions, 2% Credit Back badge
Shows 'Upgrade to Trade Account' with 'Get exclusive trade pricing and earn 2% credit back' message and Apply Now button

feature_summary.description: Trade customers earn 2% credit back on completed orders and can view/redeem credits

ui_components_verified.trade_credit_balance_card: Orange/amber gradient card with Available Balance, Total Earned, Total Redeemed
ui_components_verified.credit_rate_badge: '2% Credit Back' badge on trade account page
ui_components_verified.recent_transactions: List showing credit back transactions with amounts
ui_components_verified.credit_info_message: 'Earn 2% credit back on every purchase. Use your credits at checkout!'
ui_components_verified.upgrade_prompt: Gray/amber gradient card with 'Upgrade to Trade Account' and 'Apply Now' button for non-trade
ui_components_verified.checkout_credit_ui: Input field and 'Use All' button for credit redemption at checkout
